author: y4rr
content: Decision: CIFAR-10 batch files use names data_batch_1.bin..data_batch_5.bin + test_batch.bin (matching torchvision 0.21 binary format). CIFAR-100 uses train.bin + test.bin. The load_cifar_batches helper is shared between Cifar10 and Cifar100 via a CifarFormat enum that selects the label header size (1 vs 2 bytes). Fine label only exposed for CIFAR-100 (coarse discarded), matching torchvision behavior.
